concerns.text: T076/T077 write checksums to data/checksums.txt and output/checksums.txt, but Constitution Principle III (Data Hygiene) requires checksums recorded in state/projects/PROJ-492-evaluating-the-statistical-validity-of-p.yaml artifact_hashes map. Task deliverable location violates constitution.

SC-001 requires manually annotated validation set of ≥100 summaries for extraction accuracy measurement, but no task creates, sources, or validates this manual annotation dataset. Implementer has no way to execute SC-001 verification.

FR-005b requires sensitivity analysis of baseline proportion across range 0.02–0.10 (step 0.01), but T031 only mentions implementing binomial test and Wilson CI without explicit sensitivity analysis implementation. Task does not cover full requirement scope.

T009 and T075 both address deterministic seeding with overlapping scope (T009 pins SEED=42, T075 ensures all modules import SEED). Redundant task coverage creates confusion; atomizer will split but should be consolidated.

FR-028 requires Quickstart guide enabling 30 URLs in ≤30 minutes, but T037 only creates the guide file without task to actually verify the 30-minute execution time claim. Missing verification step for FR-028.

Phase X tasks (T080-T094) are verification tasks that depend on prior implementation completion. Some tasks (e.g., T080 verify SC-001) reference artifacts that may not exist if upstream tasks fail. Consider adding dependency markers.
